back: A set of programs and data that tell a computer what to do.
Software that provides services for the user.
Word processors, email software and games.
Software that provides services that the computer requires to operate.
Software that manages hardware and software resources and provides a user interface.

front: What does an operating system do?
back: Provides a user interface, manages hardware and loads software into RAM.
Software that helps to maintain, manage or configure a computer system.
Backup software, antivirus software, disk clean-up, disk defragmentation and compression tools.
Creates copies of files so they can be restored if lost or damaged.
Detects, prevents and removes malicious software.
Removes unnecessary files to free up storage space.
Reorganises files on a hard disk so they are stored contiguously and can be accessed faster.
Reduce file size so they use less storage and can be transmitted faster.

front: What is the key difference between system software and application software?
back: System software runs the computer, while application software helps the user perform tasks.
